BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-941 Check if policyEffFromDate is greater than current date ---

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: --- VE-1168 Discard any other types of messages ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether transient error or not

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: transient error, throw exception for retry

Values.value: Failed to execute AutoActivateChallenge service due to transient error. Throwing exception for retry.

SEQUENCE.NAME: false
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: not transient error, push message to dead letter queue
----ALTVE-220, do not send to DLQ,perform retry as reqd--

MAP.COMMENT: --eligibility faiure due to no limits, ignore error
--- get connection and destination details of original queue ---

Values.value: AutoActivateChallenge --- Non-Transient Error --- JMS message for entity %PolicyPointsAndEventsChangeMessage/PolicyPointsAndEventsChangeMessage/EventInfo[0]/EntityNumber% pushed for Retry ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- Generic Retry for twice and drop message ---

Values.value: Message Posted to Generic Retry Mechanism for AutoActivateChallenge
